chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 570 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.4755/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.4756/2023 (Stay) 03.11.2023 Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for applicants. J U D G E Abdul Basit
